label: Bollinger Band
signal: Long when price crosses below the lower Bollinger Band (30d, 2 sigma); 30-day minimum hold.
description: Mean-reversion band timing on daily bars: long when price crosses below the lower Bollinger Band (30d, 2.0σ), minimum 30-day hold. Long only, 5bps/side.
reference: Bollinger (2001), 'Bollinger on Bollinger Bands'; timing variant proprietary
